error_signature: linter error with inputs and outputs definition
title: Linter error with inputs/outputs after n8n update
symptom: After updating the n8n-workflow package, the linter throws errors for the inputs and outputs definitions in custom nodes.
not_this_if: Using an older version of n8n-workflow
root_cause: The update to the n8n-workflow package introduced stricter linting rules that require the use of the NodeConnectionType Enum for defining inputs and outputs, rather than string literals.
fix_steps: Update the eslint package to the latest version
Change inputs and outputs to use NodeConnectionType Enum
agent_instruction: Update eslint and ensure inputs/outputs use NodeConnectionType Enum.
